description_long: This house is a modern, multi-story residential building situated on a square plot of green lawn, bordered by a straight, gray road running alongside and partially through the property. The structure features a mix of flat and slightly sloped roofs, with a combination of brick-red and gray exterior surfaces, giving it a contemporary appearance. The building is composed of several interlocking rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic and layered facade. Windows are distributed asymmetrically across the exterior, with some large panes and others smaller, contributing to a varied visual rhythm. The main entryway appears to be recessed, possibly with a small porch or overhang, and the house is surrounded by a low boundary wall. The overall design suggests a focus on modern urban living, with clear access to the adjacent road and a compact, efficient footprint.
description: A modern, multi-story house with brick-red and gray exteriors, flat and slightly sloped roofs, and asymmetrical window placement, set on a green lawn with a road running alongside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, layered facade, and the road running vertically along the right side of the house.
description_view_1: Side view with the road running horizontally in front, highlighting the house's rectangular volumes and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view with the road on the left, showing the back of the house and more of the green lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the road running horizontally behind the house, emphasizing the building's depth and multi-level structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small porch or overhang, possibly flanked by low walls and direct access to the road.
